zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de NEVERS於1170年10月28日出生在法國布格尼艾福內維斯時，她的父親Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre20歲，母親Mathilde de Bourgone16歲。她於1184年1月與Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon結婚。她去世於1193年2月6日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易麥利享年22歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de NEVERS于1170年10月28日出生在法国布格尼艾福內維斯时，她的父亲Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre20岁，母亲Mathilde de Bourgone16岁。她于1184年1月与Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon结婚。她去世于1193年2月6日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易麥利享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: NEVERS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de NEVERS was born on 28 October 1170, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, her father, Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre, was 20 and her mother, Mathilde de Bourgone, was 16. She married Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon in January 1184. She died on 6 February 1193, in Mailly, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de NEVERS est née le 28 octobre 1170, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Bourgone, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon en janvier 1184. Elle est décédée le 6 février 1193, à Mailly, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de NEVERS am 28. Oktober 1170 in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre 20 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Bourgone 16. Sie hat im Januar 1184 Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon geheiratet. Sie starb am 6. Februar 1193 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Mailly, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de NEVERS è nata il il 28 ottobre 1170 nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Bourgone, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon nel gennaio 1184. Morì il 6 febbraio 1193, nel Mailly, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 22 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de NEVERSが1170年10月28日にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerreは20歳，母Mathilde de Bourgoneは16歳であった。1184年1月にOlivier Albus Lord of Grignonと結婚した。彼女は1193年2月6日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーメイリーで22歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de NEVERS(이)가 1170년 10월 28일 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Bourgone(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1184년 1월 Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1193년 2월 6일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 메이리에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.28 OCT 1170–6 FEB 1193: 28 de outubro de 1170–6 de fevereiro de 1193
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de NEVERS nasceu em 28 de outubro de 1170, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Bourgone, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon em janeiro de 1184. Ela faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1193, em Mailly, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 22 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de NEVERS родилась 28 октября 1170 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Nevers V, Comte de Nevers et d'Auxerre было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Bourgone, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon январь 1184 г. Она умерла 6 февраля 1193 г. в местности меилли, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 22 лет.

Se casó con Olivier Albus Lord of Grignon en enero de 1184. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1193, en Mailly, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 22 años.
